Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input
Input event handling and device abstraction for FlixelGDX.

This package contains the core classes and interfaces responsible for capturing, processing, and dispatching input events from all supported platforms and devices in FlixelGDX. It serves as the entry point for polling or receiving notifications about user interactions such as keyboard input, mouse movement and clicks, touch gestures, controller/gamepad actions, and virtual or custom device signals. Its design enables consistent, cross-platform handling of user controls for games and interactive applications.

Where things live

  • Keyboard: FlixelKeyInputManager on Flixel.keys.
  • Mouse / pointers: FlixelMouseManager on Flixel.mouse.
  • Gamepads: FlixelGamepadManager on Flixel.gamepads.
  • Logical actions (rebindable layers): me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action (FlixelActionSet, FlixelActionDigital, FlixelActionAnalog).

Action sets do not implement InputProcessor; they poll the managers above each frame. See FlixelActionSet for lifecycle and examples.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action
    Logical input actions: named FlixelAction instances grouped in a FlixelActionSet, with tagged FlixelInputBinding and FlixelAnalogAxisBinding so keyboard, gamepad, pointer, and touch regions never share one ambiguous integer bucket.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad
    Gamepad input support for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard
    Keyboard input support for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.mouse
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    FlixelInputManager
    Shared per-frame contract for polled input managers (keyboard, mouse, gamepads).
    FlixelInputProcessorManager
    Input manager that participates in libGDX InputMultiplexer wiring.
